comment: GUIDE PURPOSE: Security Architecture and Hardening Standards for authentication, data authorization, signature verification, and protection against common vulnerability vectors

rules.title: Server Side Session Verification
rules.requirement: Always verify user sessions on the server using dynamic, cryptographic token validation
rules.mechanism: Invoke supabase.auth.getUser() on the server inside Next.js Server Actions or API Routes instead of getSession()

rules.title: Row Level Security (RLS) Enforcement
rules.requirement: All database tables must have Row Level Security enabled with explicit access policies
rules.mechanism: Run ALTER TABLE table_name ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; and restrict reads/writes based on auth.uid(). Never use SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY on the client

rules.title: SQL Injection Mitigation
rules.requirement: Never interpolate variables directly into SQL queries
rules.mechanism: Use parameterized inputs for pool.query and database SDK filters (.eq(), .in())

rules.title: Stripe Webhook Signature Verification
rules.requirement: Cryptographically verify Stripe webhook payload signatures
rules.mechanism: Invoke stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(body, signature, secret) to prevent spoofing and replay attacks

rules.title: ReDoS Prevention
rules.requirement: Regular expressions must not contain nested quantifiers or overlapping groups
rules.mechanism: Enforce maximum length validation checks on user inputs before testing regex patterns

rules.title: SSTI and XSS Mitigation
rules.requirement: Do not use runtime string template parsers that execute raw code
rules.mechanism: Use React components/JSX which escape inputs automatically. Sanitize string inputs using a central utility before rendering as HTML

rules.title: Double Submit Guards on Mutations
rules.requirement: All write transactions and server action mutations must be protected against double clicks and concurrent repeat submissions
rules.mechanism: Check the current state or status in the database immediately before updating (for example, throw error if status is completed)

rules.title: HIPAA Compliant Access Auditing
rules.requirement: Access to patient data, downloads, and clinical report file paths must be audited and logged
rules.mechanism: Insert an audit entry recording actor ID, email, action type, timestamp, and metadata prior to generating download access urls

rules.title: Atomic Database RPC Transactions
rules.requirement: Financial balance calculations, ledger increments, or status deductions must be calculated atomically to prevent concurrency race conditions
rules.mechanism: Execute increments/payouts using database level functions or RPC queries

rules.title: Secure Mobile Token and Session Storage
rules.requirement: Prevent extraction of authentication tokens and sensitive state on mobile interfaces
rules.mechanism: Store all credentials and session tokens in secure, HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax/Strict cookies instead of unencrypted localStorage or sessionStorage, mitigating script based token harvesting

rules.title: Touch Paste Validation and Clipboard Safeguards
rules.requirement: Mitigate security risks associated with malicious payload execution via clipboard injection on touch devices
rules.mechanism: Sanitize all values pasted into inputs via the paste event handler. Never automate reads from or writes to the user clipboard without explicit user gestures and permissions checks
